companies.name: NVIDIA CORP
companies.rationale: NVIDIA is a leading player in the GPU market and a major semiconductor company.

companies.name: INTEL CORP
companies.rationale: Intel is a dominant name in microprocessors and a key player in the semiconductor industry.

companies.name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
companies.rationale: AMD is a significant competitor in CPUs and GPUs, an influential semiconductor company.

companies.name: QUALCOMM INC/DE
companies.rationale: Qualcomm is a leader in wireless technology and semiconductors for mobile devices.

companies.name: TEXAS INSTRUMENTS INC
companies.rationale: Texas Instruments specializes in analog chips and embedded processors, sectors within semiconductors.

companies.name: Broadcom Inc.
companies.rationale: Broadcom is a major developer and global supplier of semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions.

companies.name: MICRON TECHNOLOGY INC
companies.rationale: Micron is a key player in memory and storage solutions in the semiconductor industry.

companies.name: APPLIED MATERIALS INC /DE
companies.rationale: Applied Materials is a leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip and advanced display in the world.

overall_rationale: The companies selected represent a mix of leading firms within the semiconductor industry, encompassing a variety of key segments such as CPUs, GPUs, memory, and other integrated circuits. This scope will provide a comprehensive view of the largest and most influential companies in the semiconductor industry over the past three years, allowing insight into current trends, performance, and strategic direction.
